creator: hlh@restart.be
text:
After Adding the debugging parafernalia:

options         DEADLKRES
options         INVARIANTS
options         INVARIANT_SUPPORT
options         WITNESS
options         WITNESS_SKIPSPIN
options         DEBUG_LOCKS
options         DEBUG_VFS_LOCKS
options         DIAGNOSTIC

I run the `git pull` which complete successfully.

During this I run:
